title: This solar stock is surging on the heels of a new Tesla deal
summary: Sunrun is partnering with Tesla to provide energy solutions for AI data centers, driving strong stock performance. This collaboration addresses growing power demands from AI infrastructure expansion. The partnership demonstrates renewable energy's critical role in scaling AI operations.
content: Sunrun, a provider of home battery storage, is working with Tesla to meet the energy needs of AI data centers.

zh.title: 这只太阳能股票因特斯拉新交易而飙升
zh.summary: Sunrun 正在与特斯拉合作为人工智能数据中心提供能源解决方案，推动强劲的股票表现。这一合作应对了人工智能基础设施扩展带来的日益增长的电力需求。该合作展示了可再生能源在扩大人工智能运营规模中的关键作用。

title: Nvidia's Huang calls black market data centers made of smuggled parts a 'dead end'
summary: Nvidia CEO Huang dismissed black market data centers using smuggled components as unsustainable, citing regulatory scrutiny. The Trump administration and Washington regulators are increasingly concerned about China accessing advanced AI technology. This reflects broader geopolitical tensions over AI chip exports and supply chain security.
content: Washington regulators and the Trump administration are increasingly wary of China getting ahold of advanced AI software and hardware.

zh.title: 英伟达黄仁勋称由走私零件组成的黑市数据中心是"死路一条"
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋认为使用走私零件的黑市数据中心不可持续，并引用了监管审查。特朗普政府和华盛顿监管机构越来越担心中国获取先进人工智能技术。这反映了关于人工智能芯片出口和供应链安全的更广泛地缘政治紧张关系。

title: Americans are as worried as ever about layoffs and losing their jobs. Why so much angst?
summary: Americans remain anxious about layoffs and job security despite recent economic improvements, according to Glassdoor research. AI-driven workplace changes are fueling persistent concerns about employment stability. The widespread worry suggests ongoing worker fears about automation and restructuring.
content: AI-fueled “anxiety about layoffs and job security are still skyrocketing,” Glassdoor research finds.

zh.title: 美国人对裁员和失业的担忧达到历史高位。为什么如此焦虑？
zh.summary: 根据Glassdoor的研究，尽管经济最近有所改善，美国人仍然对裁员和工作保障感到焦虑。人工智能驱动的工作场所变化加剧了对就业稳定性的持续担忧。广泛的担忧表明员工对自动化和重组的持续恐惧。

title: This life sciences stock has a secret weapon, and AI will only make it more valuable
summary: IQVIA controls one of the world's largest healthcare information databases deeply integrated into clinical research operations. AI capabilities will enhance the value of this proprietary data asset for research and drug development. The company's data dominance positions it to profit from AI-driven healthcare innovation.
content: IQVIA controls one of the world's largest databases of healthcare information that's closely integrated the clinical research process.

zh.title: 这家生命科学公司股票有秘密武器，AI只会让它更值钱
zh.summary: IQVIA掌控全球最大的医疗保健信息数据库之一，深度集成于临床研究运营中。AI能力将提升该专有数据资产在研究和药物开发中的价值。该公司的数据优势使其能够从AI驱动的医疗创新中获利。

title: Cerebras CEO says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings
summary: Cerebras CEO claims the company's margin forecast was misinterpreted, leading to a sharp stock decline after earnings. The AI chipmaker faces pressure from a staggered lock-up expiration that will release more shares for trading this week. These combined factors are pressuring the stock price.
content: AI chipmaker Cerebras has a staggered lock-up expiration that includes some shares becoming available for trading this week.

zh.title: Cerebras首席执行官称利润率预测遭"误解"，财报后股价暴跌
zh.summary: Cerebras首席执行官声称该公司的利润率预测被误解，导致财报发布后股价急剧下跌。这家AI芯片制造商面临分期解锁到期的压力，本周将释放更多股份进行交易。这些因素共同作用正在打压股价。

title: Broadcom stock needs a win. The new OpenAI co-designed Jalapeno chip might do the trick
summary: Broadcom is working with OpenAI on a new AI chip called Jalapeno, which could provide a needed boost to Broadcom's struggling stock. The collaboration with ChatGPT's creator aims to deliver custom silicon for AI workloads. This partnership represents a potential turnaround opportunity for the semiconductor company.
content: The news involving OpenAI, the creator of ChatGPT, comes as Broadcom stock fights to get back on track.

zh.title: 博通股票需要转机，OpenAI联合设计的Jalapeno新芯片可能带来突破
zh.summary: 博通正在与OpenAI合作开发一款名为Jalapeno的新AI芯片，这可能为博通陷入困境的股票提供急需的提振。与ChatGPT创造者的合作旨在为AI工作负载交付定制硅芯片。这一伙伴关系代表了该半导体公司的潜在转机机会。

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as global tech rout hits SpaceX
summary: Elon Musk lost his trillionaire status following a severe global technology sector decline that erased billions in wealth. The tech market selloff significantly impacted his SpaceX stake and other holdings. The loss highlights the volatility of wealth concentration in tech entrepreneurs.
content: Elon Musk lost his trillionaire status on Tuesday after a brutal global tech rout erased billions from his wealth.

zh.title: 全球科技暴跌之际，埃隆·马斯克失去万亿富翁地位
zh.summary: 全球科技行业遭遇严重衰退，埃隆·马斯克随之失去了万亿富翁地位，其财富被抹去数十亿美元。这次科技市场暴售严重影响了他在SpaceX的股份和其他资产。该事件突显了科技企业家财富集中所带来的波动性风险。

title: Baroness Mone among individuals sued to recover PPE Medpro millions
summary: Baroness Mone and her husband Doug Barrowman are among individuals being sued to recover funds owed to the government through the PPE Medpro business. The lawsuit aims to recoup money from those involved in the controversial pandemic-era supply company. This continues legal efforts to hold individuals accountable for alleged misuse of government funds.
content: The Baroness and her husband Doug Barrowman are among individuals being sued in a bid to recover some of the money owed to the government by the business.

zh.title: 莫恩男爵夫人等被起诉收回PPE Medpro数百万美元
zh.summary: 莫恩男爵夫人及其丈夫道格·巴罗曼等人因涉及争议性疫情供应公司PPE Medpro而被起诉，以收回欠政府的资金。该诉讼旨在追回那些参与该公司的人员所欠款项。此举是继续推进对据称滥用政府资金人员的法律问责。

title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill, demanding voter ID provision
summary: President Trump canceled his signing of a bipartisan housing bill just one hour before the scheduled Capitol ceremony. The cancellation centered on Trump's demand for a voter ID provision not originally included in the legislation. The move signals potential conflict over immigration-related amendments to housing affordability efforts.
content: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.

zh.title: 特朗普取消住房法案签署，要求加入选民身份验证条款
zh.summary: 特朗普在原定国会签署仪式前一小时取消了对跨党派住房法案的签署。取消原因是特朗普要求在法案中加入原本不包含的选民身份验证条款。此举表明在与移民相关的住房可负担性修正案问题上可能引发冲突。

title: Traders are getting worried the chip stock bull market is cracking. How to protect yourself
summary: Options traders are significantly increasing purchases of protective contracts on the iShares Semiconductor ETF as concerns grow about the chip stock rally's sustainability. Rising hedging activity suggests growing worry among institutional investors about a potential market downturn. The defensive positioning indicates skepticism about semiconductor valuations after their strong run.
content: Options traders were buying a lot of protection on the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) on Tuesday.

zh.title: 交易员担心芯片股票牛市出现裂痕。如何保护自己
zh.summary: 随着对芯片股票涨势可持续性的担忧加剧，期权交易员正在大幅增加在iShares半导体ETF上的保护性合约购买。上升的对冲活动表明机构投资者对潜在市场下跌的担忧增加。这种防守性定位表明市场对半导体估值的怀疑，尤其是在其强劲上涨之后。

title: Everyone on Wall Street now believes in buying the dip. That is exactly why you should worry.
summary: Widespread belief among Wall Street traders that market dips should always be bought has historically underperformed the broader stock market over long periods. The consensus "buy the dip" mentality may be creating complacency in markets at risk of significant correction. Investors relying on this strategy alone face potential downside if market dynamics shift.
content: A strategy that feels like free money actually lags the stock market over the long term.

zh.title: 华尔街所有人现在都相信低买高卖。这正是你应该担忧的原因
zh.summary: 华尔街交易员普遍认为应该在市场下跌时买入的信念在长期内的表现不如整个股票市场。这种"低买"的共识可能会在市场面临重大调整风险时造成自满。如果市场动态发生变化，仅依赖这一策略的投资者可能面临下行风险。

title: Social Security says I was overpaid for 7 years. I believe it’s mistaken. Can they cut my benefits?
summary: A retiree questions Social Security's claim that they were overpaid over seven years, disputing the agency's accounting of their earnings in different years. The situation highlights potential administrative errors in Social Security's payment verification process. The individual faces possible benefit reduction if the overpayment is confirmed.
content: “They say I made $43,000 in 2019, but I actually made that in 2020.”

zh.title: 社会保障局说我被多付了7年的福利。我认为这是错误的。他们能削减我的福利吗？
zh.summary: 一位退休人员质疑社会保障局声称其在七年内被多付的说法，对该机构在不同年份的收入计算提出质疑。这种情况突显了社会保障局支付验证过程中可能存在的行政错误。如果确认多付，该个人可能面临福利削减。

title: Oil tankers with 35 million barrels stuck in Persian Gulf exited Strait of Hormuz since Iran deal
summary: The exit of 35 million barrels of oil from the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz has accelerated since the Iran deal, reflecting increased export activity. The reduced threat level for shipping in the strategic corridor suggests improved regional stability. The increased oil exports may influence global energy markets and prices.
content: The jump in oil exports comes as the threat level for ships crossing Hormuz has been downgraded to "moderate."

zh.title: 伊朗核协议以来，35百万桶石油的油轮已退出波斯湾霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 自伊朗核协议以来，通过霍尔木兹海峡从波斯湾出口的35百万桶石油加速增长，反映出出口活动增加。这条战略走廊的航运威胁水平降低，表明地区稳定性改善。石油出口增加可能会影响全球能源市场和价格。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Cerebras Systems, KB Home, Expedia, Exxon Mobil & more
summary: Multiple companies are seeing significant stock price movements in midday trading, including AI chipmaker Cerebras, homebuilder KB Home, travel platform Expedia, and energy giant Exxon Mobil. The article provides market updates on these significant movers. This captures real-time market activity across technology, housing, travel, and energy sectors.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 中午股票最大涨跌：Cerebras Systems、KB Home、Expedia、埃克森美孚等
zh.summary: 多家公司在中午交易中股价出现显著波动，包括AI芯片制造商Cerebras、房屋建筑商KB Home、旅游平台Expedia和能源巨头埃克森美孚。该文章提供了这些重要波动股票的市场更新。这捕捉了科技、房地产、旅游和能源部门的实时市场活动。

title: The tech stocks now leading this bull market are far more volatile than the old guard
summary: The current stock market bull run is increasingly driven by newer, more volatile tech stocks rather than traditional large-cap tech leaders of previous years. Early AI pioneers are now acting as market kingmakers, setting the tone for broader market movements. The shift highlights both opportunity and risk in the current market leadership.
content: This new chapter started when the early AI stalwarts began serving as the next kingmakers of the market.

zh.title: 当前领导这场牛市的科技股比老牌股票波动性要大得多
zh.summary: 当前股市牛市越来越多地由新兴、波动性更强的科技股推动，而不是以前的传统大型科技公司。早期AI先驱现在充当市场造王者，为更广泛的市场走势定调。这一转变突显了当前市场领导力中的机遇和风险。

title: Train passed red signal before fatal crash - report
summary: A preliminary report indicates a train passed a red signal before a fatal crash, according to the Independent Rail Accident Investigation Branch. This finding highlights potential safety protocol failures in rail operations.
content: A preliminary report from the Independent Rail Accident Investigation Branch is published.

zh.title: 列车在致命撞车前闯过红信号 - 报告
zh.summary: 根据独立铁路事故调查委员会的初步报告，一列列车在致命撞车前闯过了红信号。这一发现凸显了铁路运营中潜在的安全协议失效问题。

title: Defense stocks plummet on reports Germany is scrapping warships; Rheinmetall stock down 17%
summary: Germany plans to cancel a multi-billion-euro project to build F126 frigates, causing defense stocks like Rheinmetall to plummet as much as 17%. The move signals a major shift in Germany's naval defense spending.
content: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to reports.

zh.title: 德国计划废弃军舰报道导致防卫股票暴跌；莱茵金属股价下跌17%
zh.summary: 德国计划取消耗资数十亿欧元的F126护卫舰建造项目，导致莱茵金属等防卫股票暴跌至多17%。此举标志着德国海军防卫开支的重大转变。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent projects that U.S. GDP growth can reach 3% by year-end through his "3-3-3" plan targeting 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP ratio, and increased oil production. The ambitious targets remain within reach despite economic headwinds.
content: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate, and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.

zh.title: 财政部长贝塞特表示美国GDP增长可在年底前回升至3%
zh.summary: 财政部长贝塞特预计，通过他的"3-3-3"计划，美国GDP增长可在年底前达到3%，该计划目标包括3%的增长率、3%的赤字占GDP比率和增加石油产量。尽管经济面临阻力，这些雄心勃勃的目标仍在可实现范围内。

title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
summary: SK Hynix, South Korea's largest chipmaker, plans a Nasdaq listing in July to raise $29.65 billion through new share issuance. The move underscores strong demand for chip manufacturing capacity amid global AI expansion.
content: The company plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at a value of 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).

zh.title: 韩国最大芯片制造商SK海力士计划7月10日前通过纳斯达克上市融资290亿美元
zh.summary: 韩国最大芯片制造商SK海力士计划在7月进行纳斯达克上市，通过新股发行融资296.5亿美元。此举反映了全球人工智能扩展背景下对芯片制造产能的强劲需求。

title: Trump claims Iran has assured U.S. there won't be tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
summary: Trump claims Iran has assured the U.S. there will be no tolls or charges for shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The assertion, if confirmed, could ease tensions over critical maritime commerce through the strategic waterway.
content: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.

zh.title: 特朗普声称伊朗向美国保证不会对霍尔木兹海峡征收通行费
zh.summary: 特朗普声称伊朗向美国保证通过霍尔木兹海峡的船运不会被征收任何通行费或费用。如果得到证实，这一说法可能会缓解对这条战略性水道关键海运贸易的紧张局势。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, AMD, Reddit, Blackberry, Arm, Take-Two, Barclays & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on Wednesday affecting companies including Nvidia, Tesla, AMD, Reddit, and others. These analyst recommendations shape investor sentiment and trading patterns across key technology and growth sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

zh.title: 周三最重要的分析师观点：英伟达、特斯拉、AMD、Reddit、黑莓、Arm、Take-Two、巴克莱等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师周三发布了影响英伟达、特斯拉、AMD、Reddit等多家公司的重要观点。这些分析师建议塑造了投资者情绪和关键科技和增长板块的交易模式。

title: I had my gallbladder removed. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a donation. Is this ethical?
summary: A hospital's fundraising solicitation to a recently discharged patient raises ethical questions about timing and appropriateness of post-procedure donation requests. The practice highlights ongoing concerns about healthcare facility fundraising tactics.
content: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”

zh.title: 我切除了胆囊。出院后，医院向我索要捐款。这合乎伦理吗？
zh.summary: 医院向刚出院的患者进行募捐活动，这引发了关于术后募捐请求的时机和恰当性的伦理问题。这种做法反映了人们对医疗机构募捐策略的持续关注。

title: These chip stocks are surging due to sky-high CPU demand. UBS sees more gains ahead
summary: Chip stocks including AMD and ARM Holdings are surging on strong CPU demand from hyperscalers building AI infrastructure, with UBS forecasting further upside. The trend reflects sustained capital investment in AI compute capacity.
content: Advanced Micro Devices and ARM Holdings could see their shares appreciate further as hyperscalers order more CPUs to power their AI models, according to UBS.

zh.title: 由于CPU需求激增，这些芯片股票涨势迅猛。瑞银集团看好后市
zh.summary: 在构建AI基础设施的超大规模公司的强劲CPU需求推动下，AMD和ARM Holdings等芯片股票涨势迅猛，瑞银集团预测将有进一步上涨。这一趋势反映了对AI计算能力的持续资本投资。

title: Blackstone says withdrawal limits are a ‘feature and not a flaw’ designed to ‘protect investors from themselves’
summary: Blackstone defends withdrawal restrictions on certain funds as protective mechanisms rather than limitations, according to its liquid-credit strategist. The defense reflects the asset manager's approach to managing liquidity constraints and investor risk.
content: Dan Oneglia, liquid-credit strategist, called the capping mechanism a “feature and not a flaw” of the structure.

zh.title: 贝莱德表示提取限制是"功能而非缺陷"，目的是"保护投资者免受自身决定的影响"
zh.summary: 贝莱德流动性信贷策略师表示，该公司将某些基金的提取限制视为保护机制而非限制。这种立场反映了这家资产管理公司管理流动性约束和投资者风险的方式。

title: Wendy's stock soars as meme traders target another turnaround play
summary: Wendy's stock is surging as meme traders target it as a potential turnaround play, with gains exceeding what fundamentals alone would justify. The trend reflects renewed retail investor interest in overlooked value opportunities.
content: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.

zh.title: 文迪股票飙升，迷因交易者瞄准另一个扭转局面的机会
zh.summary: 文迪股票正在飙升，迷因交易者将其视为潜在的扭转局面机会，涨幅超过基本面本身能证明的水平。这一趋势反映了散户投资者对被忽视的价值机会的重新兴趣。

title: Slate Auto says each $24,950 electric pickup truck will be profitable as it aims to be cash-flow positive next year
summary: Slate Auto claims its $24,950 electric pickup trucks will be profitable on a per-unit basis, targeting cash-flow positivity in 2027. The assertion demonstrates the EV startup's confidence in its manufacturing efficiency and market positioning.
content: EV startup Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy told CNBC that every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive.

zh.title: Slate Auto表示每辆24,950美元的电动皮卡将实现盈利，目标明年实现正现金流
zh.summary: Slate Auto声称其24,950美元电动皮卡在单位基础上将实现盈利，目标在2027年达到正现金流。该主张表明这家电动汽车初创公司对其制造效率和市场地位充满信心。

title: Democrats see midterm hope in reliably red Iowa as Trump approval ratings sag
summary: Democrats identify opportunity to gain House seats in traditionally Republican Iowa as Trump's approval ratings decline. Rural voter sentiment shifts could reshape electoral maps ahead of midterm elections.
content: The path back to a House majority could run through states such as Iowa, where Democrats in recent elections have struggled to win over rural voters.

zh.title: 特朗普支持率下降，民主党在传统红州艾奥瓦州看到中期选举希望
zh.summary: 随着特朗普支持率下滑，民主党在传统共和党州艾奥瓦州发现了赢得众议院席位的机会。农村选民情绪的转变可能在中期选举前重塑选票地图。

title: Tesla and Waymo are chasing the robotaxi dream — but the company spending the most to win builds no cars at all
summary: Uber is investing heavily with $500 million commitments to secure robotaxi services, while Tesla and Waymo pursue competing autonomous vehicle strategies. The competitive dynamics reveal significant capital spending on autonomous ride-hailing despite limited near-term profitability.
content: Uber is quietly writing $500 million checks to lock in robotaxis as Waymo threatens to leave it behind.

zh.title: 特斯拉和Waymo追逐机器人出租车梦想——但花最多钱赢的公司根本不造车
zh.summary: Uber投入巨资，承诺投入5亿美元以确保获得机器人出租车服务，而特斯拉和Waymo追求竞争性的自动驾驶战略。竞争动态显示尽管短期盈利有限，但自动乘坐共享仍有大量资本支出。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Cerebras, Micron, FedEx, Wendy's & more
summary: Several stocks including Cerebras, Micron, FedEx, and Wendy's posted significant premarket moves reflecting overnight developments and earnings reactions. These early trading patterns often signal the broader market direction for the session ahead.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：Cerebras、美光、联邦快递、温蒂汉堡等
zh.summary: 包括Cerebras、美光、联邦快递和温蒂汉堡在内的多只股票在盘前出现大幅波动，反映了隔夜发展和收益反应。这些早期交易模式通常预示着当日更广泛的市场方向。

title: Tech companies would have to pay AI data center energy costs under bill moving in Congress
summary: Congressional legislation would require tech companies to bear the full energy costs of operating AI data centers rather than relying on subsidized power. The bill represents a potential policy shift with significant implications for AI infrastructure investment returns.
content: A House subcommittee may advance legislation Wednesday to make tech companies pay the energy costs for operating data centers to power AI.

zh.title: 根据国会推进的法案，科技公司将必须支付AI数据中心的能源成本
zh.summary: 国会立法将要求科技公司承担运营AI数据中心的全部能源成本，而不是依赖补贴电力。该法案代表了一个潜在的政策转变，对AI基础设施投资回报有重大影响。

title: US to probe petrol price gouging claims, Trump says
summary: Trump's administration will investigate allegations of oil price manipulation as global crude prices have dropped but remain elevated following regional conflict.
content: The presidents remarks come as global oil prices have fallen but remain higher than before teh Iran war.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国将调查汽油价格欺诈指控
zh.summary: 特朗普政府将调查石油价格操纵指控，因为全球原油价格已下降但在地区冲突后仍保持高位。

title: Defense giant KNDS plans IPO in Paris and Frankfurt
summary: German defense contractor KNDS plans to list shares on Paris and Frankfurt exchanges, with existing shareholders expected to divest up to 20% of their holdings.
content: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.

zh.title: 防务巨头KNDS计划在巴黎和法兰克福上市
zh.summary: 德国防务承包商KNDS计划在巴黎和法兰克福交易所上市，现有股东预计将减持其持股的20%。

title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
summary: Morgan Stanley significantly increased its forecast for China's humanoid robotics market as manufacturers accelerate real-world commercial deployments.
content: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利翻倍中国人形机器人出货预测，商业化加速
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利大幅上调了对中国人形机器人市场的预测，因为制造商加快推进实际商业部署。

title: Asia tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung jumps 9%
summary: Asian technology stocks rebounded Wednesday following a global selloff, with Samsung surging 9% amid volatile trading conditions.
content: Asia's technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.

zh.title: 亚洲科技股在全球暴跌后反弹;三星飙升9%
zh.summary: 亚洲科技股在全球抛售后的周三反弹,三星在波动的交易条件中飙升9%。

title: Oil extends decline as Trump accuses oil firms of 'gouging' consumers
summary: President Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following recent declines in crude oil costs.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

zh.title: 特朗普指责油企"宰客"之际,油价继续下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普总统加强了对石油公司的压力,要求他们在原油成本最近下降后降低汽油价格。

title: Burnham likely to replace Reeves if he becomes PM
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to offer Rachel Reeves a junior cabinet position if he becomes prime minister, marking a significant demotion.
content: Rachel Reeves would be offered a more junior cabinet role, the BBC understands.

zh.title: 如果伯纳姆成为首相,他可能会取代里夫斯
zh.summary: 如果伯纳姆成为首相,他预计会向瑞秋·里夫斯提供一个初级内阁职位,这标志着一次重大降职。

title: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
summary: Ukraine's recent political and military victories, including successful deep-strike operations, have strengthened national confidence during the ongoing war with Russia.
content: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.

zh.title: 乌克兰正在提高俄罗斯战争成本——并考验普京的决心
zh.summary: 乌克兰最近取得的政治和军事胜利，包括成功的深度打击行动，在与俄罗斯的持续战争中加强了民族信心。

title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
summary: Three Democratic Socialist-backed candidates won New York House primary races, with two incumbents defeated a year after the DSA's mayoral victory.
content: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

zh.title: 三位获得马姆达尼支持的纽约民主党人赢得众议院初选；2名现任议员落败
zh.summary: 三名民主社会主义支持的候选人赢得了纽约众议院初选，在民主社会主义组织市长选举胜利一年后，两名现任议员被击败。

title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
summary: Cboe, operator of the VIX volatility index, launched prediction markets to capitalize on surging demand in the fast-growing sector.
content: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.

zh.title: VIX所有者Cboe进入预测市场以扩展零日期权增长
zh.summary: VIX波动率指数的运营商Cboe推出了预测市场，以利用快速增长部门中不断增加的需求。

title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
summary: Alphabet joins the Dow Jones Industrial Average as Verizon exits, reflecting technology's expanding influence in the premier index.
content: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

zh.title: 字母表加入道琼斯工业平均指数，取代威瑞森
zh.summary: 字母表加入道琼斯工业平均指数，而威瑞森退出，反映了科技在这个顶级指数中影响力的扩大。

title: Anthropic’s Mythos model found vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government systems, official says: AP
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model successfully identified security vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government computer systems during a testing exercise, according to a U.S. official. This demonstrates the model's capability in cybersecurity testing and highlights AI's potential to find weaknesses in highly secure systems. The achievement underscores both the promise and risk considerations around deploying advanced AI for national security purposes.
content: A U.S. official told The Associated Press on Tuesday that one of Anthropic's artificial intelligence models had identified vulnerabilities in highly sensitive and secure U.S. government computer systems during a testing exercise.

zh.title: 官员表示：Anthropic的Mythos模型在美国机密政府系统中发现漏洞
zh.summary: 根据美国官员称，Anthropic的Mythos AI模型在一次测试演习中成功识别了美国机密政府计算机系统中的安全漏洞。这展示了该模型在网络安全测试中的能力，并突出了AI在发现高度安全系统中弱点的潜力。这一成就既强调了将先进AI用于国家安全的前景，也凸显了相关的风险考虑。

title: Who could be the UK's next chancellor?
summary: Following the UK prime minister's resignation, the race is underway to select the next chancellor, the country's chief financial officer. The successor will shape Britain's economic policy during a period of fiscal uncertainty and must address priorities including tax policy, spending, and inflation management. The selection carries significant weight for markets and the broader British economy.
content: The prime minister's resignation has fired the starting gun on the race to be in charge of the UK's finances.

zh.title: 谁可能成为英国的下一任财政大臣？
zh.summary: 在英国首相辞职后，选择下一任财政大臣的竞争已经开始。作为该国的首席财务官，继任者将在财政不确定时期制定英国经济政策，并必须应对包括税收政策、支出和通胀管理在内的优先事项。这一选择对市场和整个英国经济有重大影响。

title: Stock futures steady ahead of Micron earnings as traders debate how far tech sell-off will go, Kospi jumps over 3%: Live updates
summary: Tech stocks experienced a broad sell-off on Tuesday, with chipmakers like Micron suffering significant losses that dragged down the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite. Traders are focused on Micron's upcoming earnings as a potential indicator of whether the tech downturn will continue or stabilize. South Korea's Kospi bucked the trend with a 3% gain, showing regional variations in sentiment.
content: A rout in chipmaker names, including Micron, weighed on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite on Tuesday.

zh.title: 股指期货在美光财报前保持稳定，交易员争论科技股抛售将走多远，韩国综合指数跳涨超3%
zh.summary: 周二科技股经历了广泛抛售，包括美光等芯片制造商遭遇重大损失，拖累了标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数。交易员关注美光即将发布的财报，作为判断科技股下滑是否会继续或稳定的潜在指标。韩国综合指数逆势上涨超3%，显示了不同地区市场情绪的差异。

title: The No. 1 NBA draft pick will make nearly $70 million as TV deals keep money flowing into the NBA
summary: The top NBA draft pick is set to earn nearly $70 million as television money continues flowing into professional basketball through lucrative media deals. Draft positioning has become critically important financially, with players falling just a few slots potentially losing tens of millions in career earnings. This concentration of wealth underscores the significant financial leverage that early draft position provides.
content: There’s so much money at stake in the NBA draft that falling a few slots could cost a player $30 million.

zh.title: NBA选秀状元将通过电视转播权协议获得近7000万美元
zh.summary: NBA首轮选秀状元将获得近7000万美元，因为电视转播权协议继续为职业篮球带来大量资金。选秀顺位在财务上变得至关重要，球员仅下滑几个位置就可能失去数千万美元的职业生涯收入。这种财富集中突出了早期选秀顺位提供的巨大财务杠杆作用。

title: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow, pivoting index’s industrial roots toward tech
summary: Alphabet (Google's parent company) is being added to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, marking a significant shift in the index's composition toward technology companies. The company's massive investments in data center infrastructure—funded through increased borrowing—align it more closely with traditional industrial businesses. This inclusion reflects the changing nature of what constitutes "industrial" enterprise in the digital economy.
content: As Alphabet rolls out more data centers — and borrowing money to do it — it can be argued that it is becoming more of an industrial company, says strategist

zh.title: Alphabet股票将加入道琼斯指数，推动指数的工业根基向科技转变
zh.summary: Alphabet（谷歌母公司）被纳入道琼斯工业平均指数，标志着该指数成分向科技公司的重大转变。该公司在数据中心基础设施上的大规模投资——通过增加借贷资金——使其与传统工业企业更加一致。这一纳入反映了在数字经济中"工业"企业特征的变化。

title: Cerebras delivers its first earnings report — but it’s not enough to lift the stock
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras reported strong revenue figures in its first earnings results, yet the stock declined in after-hours trading, suggesting investor skepticism about profitability or growth prospects. The market's lukewarm response despite positive financials indicates heightened caution in the AI hardware sector. The performance highlights how strong revenue alone may not drive stock gains amid broader market volatility.
content: Despite upbeat revenue figures, Cerebras’s stock was falling in after-hours trading.

zh.title: Cerebras发布首份财报——但不足以推动股价上涨
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras在首次财报中报告了强劲的收入数字，但股票在盘后交易中下跌，表明投资者对盈利能力或增长前景持怀疑态度。尽管财务数据积极，市场反应冷淡表明AI硬件部门谨慎态度提高。这一表现突出了在更广泛的市场波动中，仅靠强劲收入可能无法推动股价上涨。

title: MSCI keeps South Korea as emerging market, delays Indonesia review amid downgrade risk
summary: MSCI maintained South Korea's classification as an emerging market rather than upgrading it to developed market status, while deferring Indonesia's review amid downgrade risk. Korea's continued emerging market status comes despite investor hopes for inclusion in MSCI's more prestigious Developed Markets classification. This decision significantly affects capital flows and investment strategies for institutional investors.
content: The review comes amid hopes that Seoul could be included in MSCI's Developed Markets watchlist.

zh.title: MSCI将韩国维持为新兴市场，推迟印尼审查以规避降级风险
zh.summary: MSCI维持了韩国作为新兴市场的分类，而非将其升级为发达市场地位，同时推迟了印尼的审查以应对降级风险。韩国继续保持新兴市场地位，尽管投资者希望纳入MSCI更高级的发达市场分类。这一决定对机构投资者的资本流动和投资策略产生重大影响。
